scientific_scope: Exact resource-restricted primary-metric bound on already-burned tapes for the integrated M/T/R family. This is neither a confirmatory Paper 2 result nor domain validation of a fungible cross-stage response team.
reason_for_version: Version 1 required every non-additive guardrail to be reconstructible under state merging. Version 2 separates an exact primary frontier from unaccelerated replay of selected schedules. A primary H_PI UCB95 below 0.01 closes the family without relying on a guardrail approximation; a material H_PI does not promote the family until a complete guardrail-constrained audit is added.

physics.researcher_extension_warning: The thesis does not establish one fungible response team shared across plant recovery, transport protection and theatre reserve. Garrido sign-off remains mandatory for any positive claim.

other_mandatory_guardrails: reserve issue, replenishment and terminal-stock ledgers

resource_envelope.response_team: Exactly one mutually exclusive M/T/R team-week in every epoch and 4032 total team-hours per episode.
resource_envelope.reserve: Identical 10000-unit initial stock, capacity, target, lead time and stock-conserving replenishment physics for every calendar.
resource_envelope.failure_rule: Any external stock creation, unequal total team-hours, unequal initial stock, superior dispatch resource or mass residual invalidates the run.

complete_frontier.calibration: Evaluate every one of the 11184811 feasible calendars on every calibration tape and select the maximum mean canonical ReT. Use deterministic guardrail then lexicographic tie-breaking after unaccelerated replay of all primary ties.
complete_frontier.locked: On each locked tape, find the exact maximum canonical ReT over every feasible calendar. Evaluate the frozen calibration winner on the same tape under CRN.
complete_frontier.h_pi: Per-tape exact feasible oracle ReT minus frozen calibration-winner ReT.
complete_frontier.selection_bias_direction: Selecting the comparator only on independent calibration can weaken it relative to the unknown best expected open-loop schedule. Therefore a locked H_PI UCB95 below 0.01 is conservative for family closure.

calibration_tie_break.scope: Applied only among calendars with exactly equal maximum aggregate canonical ReT on the 60 calibration tapes.
calibration_tie_break.required_replay: Replay every exact primary tie on all calibration tapes with the original simulator before selection.
calibration_tie_break.aggregate_rule: Use the arithmetic mean across the frozen 60 calibration tapes for each numeric guardrail.
calibration_tie_break.missing_or_nonfinite_rule: Fail closed; never skip an unavailable guardrail or alter this ordering after calibration.
calibration_tie_break.scientific_interpretation: All tied calendars remain exact primary maximizers. The frozen guardrail ordering chooses one resource-conservative comparator without looking at locked tapes.

acceleration_proof.primary_state_merge_rule: Prefixes may merge only after byte-for-byte equality under semantic Markov key v4, which preserves the complete frozen future SimPy runtime graph including alias classes, event payloads, callback ownership and closure state, generator continuations, containers, resource users and queues, RNG states, controller state, unresolved orders, relevant risk events and every transition-relevant simulator attribute. Every discarded collision prefix must additionally close all admissible successor actions into a terminal-to-root obligation graph with bitwise-equal incremental labels. A one-step comparison alone is not authorization.
acceleration_proof.output_label_rule: Completed visible-order ReT rows remain path labels and are never used to merge physical states. Future rows may be appended only after reduced-horizon exhaustive equivalence proves immutability of prior rows and equality with unaccelerated simulation.
acceleration_proof.reduced_horizon_gate: Before any 24-week result, the current key schema must reproduce every calendar bitwise at 12 weeks on all five collision-suite tapes and at 16 weeks on the designated hard tape.
acceleration_proof.numeric_exactness: Calendar selection must use exact binary64 row sums/counts or a documented rounding enclosure that proves the winner cannot change. Approximate top-k search is forbidden.
acceleration_proof.unaccelerated_replay: Replay the calibration winner, every primary tie that can affect selection, and every locked oracle winner with supply_chain.paper2_bottleneck.run_policy. Canonical ReT must match the accelerated score within the preregistered bitwise or certified-rounding rule; compute all guardrails and resource ledgers only from these original-simulator replays.
acceleration_proof.failure_rule: Any unclassified mutable state, unknown callback owner, incomplete alias graph, byte mismatch, dangling collision obligation, reduced-horizon mismatch, numeric ambiguity, replay mismatch, CRN mismatch or nonzero approximation gap invalidates the acceleration and leaves the family active_for_bound. A cap or timeout may yield only BISIMULATION_CERTIFICATE_INCOMPLETE, never sampled authorization.

reduced_horizon_certification.provenance_rule: Each new result must use exact-transducer schema v5, bound authorization schema v9, exact launch authorization/receipt schemas v2, portable retrieved-transfer schema v2 and retrieved-pair schema v3 or explicit launch-host pair schema v2, isolated-runtime schema v2, and W24-audit schema v3 or later; pin the producing commit, runner, isolated bootstrap and dependency file manifests, portable and host-runtime digests, sanitized child-environment digest, execution nonce, caller-retained prelaunch signing fingerprints, caller-retained transfer-manifest digests, exact seed/context/split/tape hashes, all-prefix callback audit, complete collision-certificate digest, and a fresh archived-pair reverification. The authorization validator must reopen both signed transfer chains (or, only in explicit local mode, every launch-host inode-bound custody artifact), reverify the signed exact receipts, reproduce every tape hash from committed code, reject symlinks in every archive-root descendant path before resolution, and ignore every persisted PASS or cached transfer-verification claim. Relocated retrieval uses the signed relative archive plan plus content hashes and must not pretend launch-host inode numbers survive transfer. The archive root is an explicit trust anchor, so its own ancestors may be platform symlinks; every path component beneath that resolved root is lexical, canonical, and non-symlink. The single W24 profile tape tests the implementation path but never substitutes for a complete per-tape certificate on each of the 60 calibration and 119 locked transducers.

decision_rules.boundary_close: Close this family only if the paired locked resource-restricted H_PI bootstrap UCB95 is strictly below 0.01. This conclusion uses the exact primary ceiling and does not require a favorable guardrail result.
decision_rules.material_headroom: If H_PI LCB95 is at least 0.01, report diagnostic physical headroom only. Do not train or claim observable value until every mandatory guardrail, liveness, signal-placebo and comparator gate is separately passed.
decision_rules.ambiguous_headroom: If the interval straddles 0.01, the family remains active and the result is not a boundary certificate.
decision_rules.guardrail_failure: A selected oracle that violates lost-order, worst-node, resource or tail guardrails cannot support Paper 2; if H_PI is material, a complete guardrail-constrained frontier is required before closure or promotion.

required: immutable git, contract and script hashes
